# Pull Request Summary

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Configuration change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release preparation

## Description

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## Configuration Items Affected

- [ ] Source code
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Runtime configuration
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI workflow
- [ ] Release notes

## Testing Evidence

Describe tests run locally and CI checks expected to pass.

## CM Review Checklist

- [ ] Change is on a branch, not committed directly to `main`.
- [ ] Files changed are relevant to the request.
- [ ] No secrets or local-only paths are committed.
- [ ] Version or changelog is updated if release behavior changes.
- [ ] Rollback plan is documented if the change is risky.
